testcase.name: getPolicy_ValidPolicyNumber_Returns200

testcase.name: submitClaim_ExceedsCoverageLimit_Returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-10T15:05:55.747Z INFO 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] c.i.claim.service.ClaimServiceImpl : Submitting claim for policy: POL-10001, type: MEDICAL 2026-03-10T15:05:55.750Z DEBUG 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select p1_0.policy_id, p1_0.coverage_limit, c1_0.policy_id, c1_0.coverage_id, c1_0.claim_type, c1_0.is_active, c1_0.limit_amount, p1_0.customer_id, p1_0.effective_date, p1_0.expiry_date, p1_0.policy_number, p1_0.status from policies p1_0 left join policy_coverages c1_0 on p1_0.policy_id=c1_0.policy_id where p1_0.policy_number=? Hibernate: select p1_0.policy_id, p1_0.coverage_limit, c1_0.policy_id, c1_0.coverage_id, c1_0.claim_type, c1_0.is_active, c1_0.limit_amount, p1_0.customer_id, p1_0.effective_date, p1_0.expiry_date, p1_0.policy_number, p1_0.status from policies p1_0 left join policy_coverages c1_0 on p1_0.policy_id=c1_0.policy_id where p1_0.policy_number=? 2026-03-10T15:05:55.755Z DEBUG 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select pc1_0.coverage_id, pc1_0.claim_type, pc1_0.is_active, pc1_0.limit_amount, pc1_0.policy_id from policy_coverages pc1_0 left join policies p1_0 on p1_0.policy_id=pc1_0.policy_id where p1_0.policy_id=? and pc1_0.claim_type=? and pc1_0.is_active Hibernate: select pc1_0.coverage_id, pc1_0.claim_type, pc1_0.is_active, pc1_0.limit_amount, pc1_0.policy_id from policy_coverages pc1_0 left join policies p1_0 on p1_0.policy_id=pc1_0.policy_id where p1_0.policy_id=? and pc1_0.claim_type=? and pc1_0.is_active 2026-03-10T15:05:55.758Z WARN 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] c.i.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Coverage exceeded: Claim amount 99000.00 exceeds coverage limit 50000.00 for claim type MEDICAL

testcase.name: getClaimsByPolicy_ExistingPolicy_Returns200
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-10T15:05:55.773Z INFO 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] c.i.claim.service.ClaimServiceImpl : Submitting claim for policy: POL-10001, type: DENTAL 2026-03-10T15:05:55.775Z DEBUG 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select p1_0.policy_id, p1_0.coverage_limit, c1_0.policy_id, c1_0.coverage_id, c1_0.claim_type, c1_0.is_active, c1_0.limit_amount, p1_0.customer_id, p1_0.effective_date, p1_0.expiry_date, p1_0.policy_number, p1_0.status from policies p1_0 left join policy_coverages c1_0 on p1_0.policy_id=c1_0.policy_id where p1_0.policy_number=?
